name: project-guides
description: Create verified operator and developer documentation from a real repository.

interface.shortDescription: Create verified user and developer guides
interface.longDescription: Inspect a repository and create a self-contained operator guide, a cited developer index, and optional future-session context.
defaultPrompt: Document this project with a user guide and developer index.
Create a cited developer index for this repository.
Check whether this project's guides are current.
